\documentclass[12pt,oneside]{book}

% =========================
% Encoding & fonts
% =========================
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage{microtype}

% =========================
% Layout & spacing
% =========================
\usepackage{geometry}
\geometry{margin=.75in}
\usepackage{setspace}
% \onehalfspacing % uncomment if you want 1.5 line spacing

% =========================
% Tables & floats
% =========================
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{float}

% Global table spacing (can still override per-table)
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.25}
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{6pt}

% =========================
% Math
% =========================
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb,amsthm,mathtools}
\newtheorem{proposition}{Proposition}[chapter]
\theoremstyle{proposition}
\newtheorem{lemma}{Lemma}[chapter] % or [section], or no optional arg
\theoremstyle{lemma}
\newtheorem{remark}{Remark}[chapter]
\theoremstyle{remark}
\newtheorem{corollary}{Corollary}[chapter]
\theoremstyle{corollary}
\usepackage{physics}

% =========================
% Graphics & TikZ
% =========================
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{decorations.pathmorphing,arrows.meta}

% =========================
% Colors & boxes
% =========================
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage[framemethod=default]{mdframed} % needed for styledexample
\usepackage[normalem]{ulem} % for \sout

% Page background tint
\pagecolor{blue!3}

% =========================
% Lists
% =========================
\usepackage{enumitem}

% =========================
% Headers/footers
% =========================
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{} % clear all
\fancyhead[LE,RO]{\thepage}                 % page number outer head
\fancyhead[LO]{\nouppercase{\rightmark}}    % chapter on odd pages
\fancyhead[RE]{\nouppercase{\leftmark}}     % section on even pages
\setlength{\headheight}{14pt}               % avoid fancyhdr warning

% =========================
% Hyperlinks (load last)
% =========================
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=blue!60!black,
  citecolor=blue!60!black,
  urlcolor=blue!60!black,
  pdftitle={Resonance Continuum Model},
  pdfauthor={Lisa Mathis}
}

% =========================
% Environments & styling
% =========================
\newenvironment{concept}
 {\begin{tcolorbox}[colback=blue!5,colframe=blue!40,
     title=\textbf{Conceptual Commentary},fonttitle=\bfseries]}
 {\end{tcolorbox}}

% Global spacing between tcolorboxes
\tcbset{
  before skip=1.2\baselineskip,
  after  skip=1.2\baselineskip
}
% Theorem environments


% Boxed example environment
\newenvironment{rcmexample}[1]{%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[
    enhanced, breakable,
    colback=gray!5, colframe=gray!30,
    arc=2mm, boxrule=0.6pt,
    left=10pt, right=10pt, top=10pt, bottom=10pt,
    title={#1}, fonttitle=\bfseries
  ]%
  \begin{description}[leftmargin=0pt, labelsep=0.6em, style=nextline]%
}{%
  \end{description}%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
}

% For labeled items inside rcmexample
\newcommand{\exitem}[1]{\item[\emph{#1}]}

% =========================
% Macros & notation
% =========================
\newcommand{\add}[1]{\textcolor{red}{#1}}
\newcommand{\del}[1]{\textcolor{gray}{\sout{#1}}}

\newcommand{\Spec}{\operatorname{Spec}}
\newcommand{\IdKer}{I}                 % Identity (delta) kernel: \IdKer(\tau)=\delta(\tau)

\let\epsilon\varepsilon                 % standardize epsilon

\newcommand{\RCM}{\textsc{RCM}}
\newcommand{\RB}[1]{\mathsf{!}_{#1}}    % renders as !_{#1}

% Grammar / notation helpers
\newcommand{\NT}[1]{\ensuremath{\langle\mathrm{#1}\rangle}}
\newcommand{\alt}{\;\mid\;}             % BNF-style alternative separator

% Fields & bundles
\newcommand{\field}{\psi}
\newcommand{\Bundle}{\mathcal{B}}
\newcommand{\Composer}{\mathcal{C}}

% Kernels
\newcommand{\Kc}{K_{c}}
\newcommand{\Kct}{\tilde{K}_{c}}
\newcommand{\conv}{\ast}

% Geometry & currents
\newcommand{\J}{J}
\newcommand{\T}{T}
\newcommand{\Aagg}{\mathbf{A}} 

% Spiral & scales
\newcommand{\pitch}{\varphi}
\newcommand{\wmin}{\omega_{c}}
\newcommand{\wmax}{\omega_{\max}}

% Constants (always explicit)
\newcommand{\clight}{c}
\newcommand{\hbarc}{\hbar}


\setcounter{secnumdepth}{0}

\begin{document}

\frontmatter

\title{\Huge \textbf{Resonance Continuum Model} \\[1em]
       \Large A Comprehensive Theory of Coherent Reality}
\author{\Large Lisa Rachelle Mathis}
\date{July 27, 2025}
\maketitle
